title: evidence.ledger
description: An append-only record of gate verdicts. Wraps schema_version and an entries array of gate-verdict entries. A node may transition verifying -> completed only when its latest entry has verdict == pass. Field names and enum values are locked byte-for-byte per references/state_model.md (evidence.ledger).

entry_id.description: Unique id of the ledger entry.

node_id.description: The node the verdict is for.

score.description: Numeric score for scored gates (0..1), or null for pass/fail gates.

artifact_path.description: Path to the evidence artifact this entry attests.

recorded.description: When the entry was recorded (ISO-8601 date-time).

supersedes.description: entry_id of a prior ledger entry this entry corrects/supersedes, or null. Lets 'latest entry governs' pick the correction rather than the stale verdict.

status.description: Lifecycle state of this evidence entry. Evidence is not a permanent fact; it can be superseded by a re-run, invalidated when its artifact is deleted/disproven, go stale past a freshness window, or be retired with its node. Only 'active' evidence may back an active gate (rule R38). Defaults to 'active' when omitted.

superseded_by.description: entry_id of the newer entry that replaces this one (set when status is 'superseded'). Must reference an existing entry.
